svg.title: Music RAG System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Data flow from user input through embedding, vector store, retrieval, reranking, and output, with human and test checkpoints shown.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of natural language queries can a user enter?')
sendPrompt('How does the Claude embedding service work?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB store and index songs?')
sendPrompt('How does the retriever find candidate songs?')
sendPrompt('How does score_song rerank the retrieved candidates?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit results UI show the user?')
sendPrompt('How does a human evaluate the RAG recommendations?')
sendPrompt('What does the automated test suite check?')
sendPrompt('What data is in the songs.csv catalog?')
